instructions: Read input/failed_tcs.json for the list of failed Test Cases.
Read input/open_bugs.json for all existing open bugs.
For each failed TC decide: link to existing bug, create new bug, or skip.
Group TCs with the same root cause — create ONE new bug for the group.
Write outputs/bulk_bug_decisions.json as described in the prompt.
For each new bug write its description to a separate file: outputs/bug_NNN_description.md (NNN = zero-padded index). Reference that file in bulk_bug_decisions.json via 'descriptionFile'.
Do NOT embed multi-line description text directly inside bulk_bug_decisions.json.
agentParams.formattingRules: outputs/bulk_bug_decisions.json must be valid JSON. 'processed' must list every TC key the AI made a decision for. newBugs[].descriptionFile must be a relative path to an existing outputs/*.md file.

customParams.openBugsJql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in (Bug) AND status not in (Done)
customParams.failedTCsJql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype = "Test Case" AND status = Failed AND (labels is EMPTY OR labels NOT IN (sm_bug_creation_triggered)) ORDER BY created ASC
